Title: KIT's Submission to Cross-Lingual Voice Cloning in IWSLT 2026
Author: Seymanur Akti, Alexander Waibel
Description: KIT's cross-lingual voice cloning system for the IWSLT 2026 track, built on the multilingual TTS model FishAudio-S2-Pro. It adds language-tag prompting to improve language control and reduce accent leakage, applies reinforcement-learning fine-tuning for task adaptation, and proposes a reference-conditioned lexical matching method to improve pronunciation of domain-specific terms.
